nab_transfer.description: Enhanced NAB real-telemetry transfer with evolved network (depth, hidden_dim params)

repair_ablation.description: Phase 3: Replay-guided shadow repair with 5 ablation arms (no repair, random, wrong-target, generic retrain, targeted shadow)

trajectory_adapters.description: Phase 4: Agent trajectory typed event adapters for prompt/tool/CI telemetry (10 adapter types, unified feature space)

cli_commands.description: New CLI commands: repair, benchmark-arch, trajectory-demo

non_claim_lock: EVO-013 adds trajectory adapters, repair ablation, and architecture benchmarking. All synthetic-only. No real-telemetry transfer claim.
